query.sql: SELECT status as name, COUNT(*) as value, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM erp_purchase_orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

option.raw: const data = (() => { const raw = ctx.data; if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.objects)) return raw.objects; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.data)) return raw.data; return []; })(); if (data.length === 0) { return { title: { text: 'No Data', left: 'center', top: 'center', textStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: 14 } } }; } const names = data.map(d => d.name || ''); const counts = data.map(d => parseInt(d.value) || 0); const amounts = data.map(d => parseFloat(d.amount) || 0); return { title: { text: 'Purchase Orders by Status', left: 'center', textStyle: { fontSize: 14 } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'axis', axisPointer: { type: 'cross' } }, legend: { top: 30, data: ['Count', 'Amount'] }, grid: { top: 70, bottom: 30, left: 60, right: 60 }, xAxis: { type: 'category', data: names, axisLabel: { rotate: 15 } }, yAxis: [{ type: 'value', name: 'Count' }, { type: 'value', name: 'Amount', axisLabel: { formatter: function(v) { return v >= 1000 ? (v/1000).toFixed(0) + 'K' : v; } } }], series: [{ name: 'Count', type: 'bar', data: counts, itemStyle: { color: '#1677ff', borderRadius: [4, 4, 0, 0] } }, { name: 'Amount', type: 'line', yAxisIndex: 1, data: amounts, smooth: true, itemStyle: { color: '#f59e0b' } }] };
